chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-950 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.7796/2025 (561-A) 2. For order on CMA No.7584/2025 (Contempt) 3. For order on MIT-II report dated 30.4.2025 03.11.2025 Mr. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant AG Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Assistant PG Mr. Raza Mian, DSP (Legal-II) CPO Shaukat Khatyan, PSP, DIGP (Investigation) Karachi Tariq Ilahi Mastoi, PSP, SSP District West, Karachi Arif Ali Jakhrani, PSP, AIGP (Legal), KPO Karachi Ashraf Rajpoot, DSP (Legal), West Zone, Karachi Muhammad Shakir, DSP, SDPO Orangi Town, Karachi Mehraj Anwar, SHO PS Mominabad SI Kashif Ahmed, IO PS Mominabad -------------------------------- At the outset, the learned Assistant Advocate General (AAG) submitted that the respondents had not committed any contempt of Court and had acted strictly in accordance with Section 154 Cr.P.C. by lodging FIRs, in which the petitioner was subsequently discharged under Section 63 Cr.P.C. The learned AAG further assured that no further action shall be taken against the petitioner, except in case of any fresh cognizable offence, which shall be dealt with strictly in accordance with law. The counsel for the petitioner refuted the stance of the learned AAG with the narration that the police shall be restrained from causing harassment to the petitioner in terms of previous orders passed by this Court. In view of the statement made by the learned AAG, the contempt application and all other pending applications stand disposed of accordingly, with the understanding that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner, subject to all just exceptions as provided under the law.

The counsel for the petitioner refuted the stance of the learned AAG with the narration that the police shall be restrained from causing harassment to the petitioner in terms of previous orders passed by this Court. In view of the statement made by the learned AAG, the contempt application and all other pending applications stand disposed of accordingly, with the understanding that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner, subject to all just exceptions as provided under the law. JUDGE Zahid/*
